channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Roger Rogoff, a former judge who also was a state and federa…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description:
Roger Rogoff, a former judge who also was a state and federal prosecutor, was unanimously appointed by a panel of federal judges to fill the job, in line with federal law, after the position in Seattle had been vacant for months.

He was fired after less than an hour on the job.
item.content:encoded:
Roger Rogoff, a former judge who also was a state and federal prosecutor, was unanimously appointed by a panel of federal judges to fill the job, in line with federal law, after the position in Seattle had been vacant for months.

He was fired after less than an hour on the job.

item.title: 🔊 Can New York arrest Netanyahu? The U.S. isn't a signatory…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: 🔊 Can New York arrest Netanyahu? The U.S. isn't a signatory to the ICC. The UN protects heads of state. ‘It appears Mayor Mamdani does not have the authority to do this.' Listen now on the Reuters World News podcast reut.rs/4pDcGgS
item.content:encoded: 🔊 Can New York arrest Netanyahu? The U.S. isn't a signatory to the ICC. The UN protects heads of state. ‘It appears Mayor Mamdani does not have the authority to do this.' Listen now on the Reuters World News podcast reut.rs/4pDcGgS

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム ヤニねこ - 393mg | ヤンマガWeb ヤニねこ。ねこがヤニ吸うっつーだけの話。なんかXで…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
ヤニねこ - 393mg | ヤンマガWeb

ヤニねこ。ねこがヤニ吸うっつーだけの話。なんかXで人気です。読めばわかるだろ、バカじゃねーんだから。
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
ヤニねこ - 393mg | ヤンマガWeb

ヤニねこ。ねこがヤニ吸うっつーだけの話。なんかXで人気です。読めばわかるだろ、バカじゃねーんだから。

item.title: From @theathletic.com: For a moment, it looked like the Miam…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathletic.com: For a moment, it looked like the Miami Heat knew LeBron James’s next destination. Then, they quickly said it was all just an innocent mistake.
item.content:encoded: From @theathletic.com: For a moment, it looked like the Miami Heat knew LeBron James’s next destination. Then, they quickly said it was all just an innocent mistake.

item.title: As wildfire risks grow in California, policies issued by the…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: As wildfire risks grow in California, policies issued by the state’s insurer of last resort are increasingly concentrated in wealthy areas, like Lake Tahoe and Beverly Hills. Here’s why—and how it could bankrupt the program.
item.content:encoded: As wildfire risks grow in California, policies issued by the state’s insurer of last resort are increasingly concentrated in wealthy areas, like Lake Tahoe and Beverly Hills. Here’s why—and how it could bankrupt the program.

item.title: OpenAI said two of its A.I. models went rogue and successful…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: OpenAI said two of its A.I. models went rogue and successfully hacked into Hugging Face, a digital library of A.I. tech that is popular among developers. A.I. labs have warned that their tech could pose risks by finding holes in computer networks faster than defenders could fix them. trib.al/6c02M1q
item.content:encoded: OpenAI said two of its A.I. models went rogue and successfully hacked into Hugging Face, a digital library of A.I. tech that is popular among developers. A.I. labs have warned that their tech could pose risks by finding holes in computer networks faster than defenders could fix them. trib.al/6c02M1q

item.title: Republican state Rep. Alexander Kolodin will face Arizona’s …
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Republican state Rep. Alexander Kolodin will face Arizona’s Democratic secretary of state, Adrian Fontes, in November’s general election, NBC News projects, after he won the GOP primary.
item.content:encoded: Republican state Rep. Alexander Kolodin will face Arizona’s Democratic secretary of state, Adrian Fontes, in November’s general election, NBC News projects, after he won the GOP primary.

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム アニメ「天幕のジャードゥーガル」4話で出てきた羊の解体シーンをモンゴル活動家が何をしていたのか解説…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
アニメ「天幕のジャードゥーガル」4話で出てきた羊の解体シーンをモンゴル活動家が何をしていたのか解説、「血抜き」ではなく「血を回収」することを目指した屠殺術

モンゴル活動（モン活）家・田中英和【新宿のモンゴル料理屋「モリンホール屋」超絶オススメ！！】 @Morinkhuurer 「天幕のジャードゥーガル」第4話で、羊の解体シーンがありました。今回は、モンゴル式解体方法についてご紹介！ まず羊を仰向けに寝かせたら、羊が身動きできないよう、解体者がその上からまたがって両前...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
アニメ「天幕のジャードゥーガル」4話で出てきた羊の解体シーンをモンゴル活動家が何をしていたのか解説、「血抜き」ではなく「血を回収」することを目指した屠殺術

モンゴル活動（モン活）家・田中英和【新宿のモンゴル料理屋「モリンホール屋」超絶オススメ！！】 @Morinkhuurer 「天幕のジャードゥーガル」第4話で、羊の解体シーンがありました。今回は、モンゴル式解体方法についてご紹介！ まず羊を仰向けに寝かせたら、羊が身動きできないよう、解体者がその上からまたがって両前...

item.content:encoded: Ukraine's president has replaced his military chief Oleksandr Syrskyi with the experienced but forward-thinking Mykhailo Drapatyi.

item.title: 教員の精神疾患での離職が最多1319人 2024年度、人手不足で負担増 www.nikkei.com/article/D…
item.author: 日経電子版 (@nikkei.com)
item.description:
教員の精神疾患での離職が最多1319人　2024年度、人手不足で負担増
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

業務量増加などを背景に志望者が減少。退職や休職で生じた欠員を埋められない「教員不足」が各地で深刻化し、現職教員の負荷がさらに高まる悪循環が起きています。

#ニュース
item.content:encoded:
教員の精神疾患での離職が最多1319人　2024年度、人手不足で負担増
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

業務量増加などを背景に志望者が減少。退職や休職で生じた欠員を埋められない「教員不足」が各地で深刻化し、現職教員の負荷がさらに高まる悪循環が起きています。

#ニュース

item.title: Investors who spent weeks watching US stocks go nowhere are …

item.description: Investors who spent weeks watching US stocks go nowhere are pinning their hopes for a breakout on a key pillar of the four-year bull run: corporate earnings
item.content:encoded: Investors who spent weeks watching US stocks go nowhere are pinning their hopes for a breakout on a key pillar of the four-year bull run: corporate earnings

item.title: 【猛暑で変わる企業の制服】 JR西日本は9月から、駅員や乗務員の制服に水色のポロシャツを試験導入する。乗客に接する社員の…
item.author: 産経ニュース (@sankei.com)
item.description:
【猛暑で変わる企業の制服】
JR西日本は9月から、駅員や乗務員の制服に水色のポロシャツを試験導入する。乗客に接する社員の着用を認めるのはJR旅客6社で初めて。ポリエステル100％の素材を使用し、従来の半袖シャツのデザインを維持しながら通気性や吸汗性を高めた。裾はズボンの中に入れて着用する。

⏬記事を読む
www.sankei.com/article/2026...
item.content:encoded:
【猛暑で変わる企業の制服】
JR西日本は9月から、駅員や乗務員の制服に水色のポロシャツを試験導入する。乗客に接する社員の着用を認めるのはJR旅客6社で初めて。ポリエステル100％の素材を使用し、従来の半袖シャツのデザインを維持しながら通気性や吸汗性を高めた。裾はズボンの中に入れて着用する。

⏬記事を読む
www.sankei.com/article/2026...

item.title: Rep. Andy Biggs has won the Republican primary in Arizona’s …
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Rep. Andy Biggs has won the Republican primary in Arizona’s race for governor, NBC News projects, setting up a battleground state matchup this fall with Democratic Gov. Katie Hobbs.
item.content:encoded: Rep. Andy Biggs has won the Republican primary in Arizona’s race for governor, NBC News projects, setting up a battleground state matchup this fall with Democratic Gov. Katie Hobbs.

item.title: From @theathletic.com: It’s one of the best times of year ac…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathletic.com: It’s one of the best times of year according to the NFL calendar, as teams brimming with expectations hit the fields for training camp. We take a look at some of the most underrated and overrated teams entering the 2026 season.
item.content:encoded: From @theathletic.com: It’s one of the best times of year according to the NFL calendar, as teams brimming with expectations hit the fields for training camp. We take a look at some of the most underrated and overrated teams entering the 2026 season.

item.title: Voters in Republican primary elections in Arizona on Tuesday…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Voters in Republican primary elections in Arizona on Tuesday nominated a former NFL kicker in a top House battleground, a Trump loyalist for governor and an election denier for the state’s top election post. Here are six takeaways.
item.content:encoded: Voters in Republican primary elections in Arizona on Tuesday nominated a former NFL kicker in a top House battleground, a Trump loyalist for governor and an election denier for the state’s top election post. Here are six takeaways.

item.title: Connections is a daily game about finding common threads bet…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Connections is a daily game about finding common threads between words. Players must select four groups of four words without making more than three mistakes. How did you do? nyti.ms/4wkPhDo
item.content:encoded: Connections is a daily game about finding common threads between words. Players must select four groups of four words without making more than three mistakes. How did you do? nyti.ms/4wkPhDo

item.title: フランス議会、15歳未満SNS禁止法案が成立 ヨーロッパで初めて施行へ www.nikkei.com/article/D…
item.author: 日経電子版 (@nikkei.com)
item.description:
フランス議会、15歳未満SNS禁止法案が成立　ヨーロッパで初めて施行へ
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

マクロン大統領肝煎りの政策。夏休みが明けて新学年が始まる9月に施行します。

EUも、2026年秋にも子どものSNS利用制限の制度案を発表する見通しです。

#ニュース
item.content:encoded:
フランス議会、15歳未満SNS禁止法案が成立　ヨーロッパで初めて施行へ
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

マクロン大統領肝煎りの政策。夏休みが明けて新学年が始まる9月に施行します。

EUも、2026年秋にも子どものSNS利用制限の制度案を発表する見通しです。

#ニュース

item.author: Fox News - Breaking News Updates | Latest News Headlines | Phot… (@foxnews.com.web.brid.gy)
